lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior from regular use. All major mechanical systems are functioning properly, and the car has been well-maintained.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is well-maintained with light wear. All mechanical systems are fully functional.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a reliable option for a buyer who values mechanical performance over cosmetic perfection. The engine and transmission remain strong and have been consistently serviced, ensuring the car runs and drives as it should. However, the exterior does show its age, with various surface scratches, a few minor dings on the passenger door, and some fading on the roof's clear coat. Inside, the cabin shows signs of regular use, including some wear on the driver's seat bolster and a few light stains on the carpet. While it isn't a showroom piece, it is a functional and dependable daily driver that still has plenty of life left in it.

Experience automotive perfection with this incredible find! This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standard. It looks, feels, and drives just like it did the day it was first sold. Truly a collector-quality example that is ready for its next home!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint is clean and still holds a nice shine, though it does show a few minor signs of normal use, including some small stone chips on the hood and a couple of faint surface scratches. Inside, the cabin is well-kept; the upholstery is in great shape with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a consistent service history, making it a dependable choice for its next owner.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless preservation. This specimen serves as the definitive benchmark for its class, having been maintained in an immaculate state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every aesthetic detail and mechanical component reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising integrity. This is a distinguished offering for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m so excited to be listing my absolute pride and joy. This car is seriously in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been pampered its whole life. No scratches, no dings, just pure perfection. If you're looking for a ride that's basically brand new without the brand new price tag, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This 996-generation Carrera 4S represents a pinnacle of analog engineering and preservation. The 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six has been fastidiously maintained, featuring a documented LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit and a recent borescope inspection confirming pristine cylinder walls. Power is managed via a tactile 6-speed manual transaxle and delivered through a rear-biased AWD system. The chassis remains taut, riding on factory-spec Bilstein dampers with M030-spec anti-roll bars. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, showing no signs of thermal stress. Every component, from the limited-slip differential to the intake plenums, operates within original factory tolerances. This garage-kept specimen retains its original paint depth and structural integrity, offering a turn-key experience for the serious collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous preservation. This car is in showroom condition, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements since new. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple and scent-free, with no visible wear on the bolsters, steering wheel, or switchgear. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is peerless, supported by a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history performed exclusively by authorized technicians. The engine bay is detailed to a mirror finish, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turn-key, investment-quality example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Includes all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom car cover.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity. A rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle represents a benchmark for its class. Inspections will confirm its status as a pristine example of the marque.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious preservation. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands an uncompromising level of quality and performance.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem. It’s been my pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in truly pristine, showroom condition. Not a single scratch or hiccup—it honestly feels like it just rolled off the lot! If you're looking for something that's basically brand new without the crazy sticker shock, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This investment-grade E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system. Power is managed via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and delivered through a variable M-differential lock. The chassis retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity, with a documented rear subframe reinforcement and meticulously maintained M-tuned suspension geometry. Every mechanical component—from the cross-drilled rotors to the bushings and fluid lines—is in showroom-caliber state. This is a rare, concours-ready example
Pristine condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Full maintenance history included.

This vehicle is the pinnacle of preservation, maintained to an exacting standard that rivals its original showroom state. Finished in a deep, mirror-like gloss with zero swirl marks or rock chips, the exterior is perfectly complemented by an interior that still smells fresh and shows no signs of wear on the premium leather bolsters. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a full portfolio of maintenance records included. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car features a pristine undercarriage and a mechanical suite that operates with surgical precision. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly flawless example.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition, exhibiting zero compromises in performance or aesthetic integrity. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a history of fastidious care. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning driver seeking showroom-quality refinement.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely stunning condition—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that’s been meticulously cared for and looks brand new, this is the one for you! Feel free to message me with any questions!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis exhibits zero fatigue, with documented subframe reinforcement and a fully refreshed VANOS system ensuring optimal variable valve timing. The factory-spec limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history included. Serious buyers only.
Used car. Condition: mint.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered and garage-kept since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'm happy to chat!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with crisp throttle response via six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains quiet, and the VANOS system has been professionally bulletproofed. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential. The chassis is structurally perfect with preventative subframe reinforcement already completed. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero rock chips or swirl marks. Mechanically flawless with a comprehensive service dossier, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of analog driving dynamics.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Service records available. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats still retain their factory-fresh scent and firm bolsters, with no signs of wear or creasing.
